requirements.title: Create Task Name
requirements.description: The user shall be able to input a name for a new task.
acceptance_criteria: The task name should be a text field.

requirements.title: Optional Task Description
requirements.description: The user shall be able to optionally add a description to a task.
acceptance_criteria: The description should be a multi-line text field.

requirements.title: Optional Due Date
requirements.description: The user shall be able to optionally set a due date for a task.
acceptance_criteria: The due date should allow selection of a date.

requirements.title: List All Tasks
requirements.description: The app shall display a list of all tasks.
acceptance_criteria: Each task in the list should show at least its name.

requirements.title: Display Task Status
requirements.description: The app shall visually indicate the completion status of each task in the list.
acceptance_criteria: A checkbox or similar visual element should be present next to each task.

requirements.title: Display Due Date (if set)
requirements.description: The app shall display the due date for tasks that have one set.

requirements.title: Mark Task as Complete
requirements.description: The user shall be able to mark an incomplete task as complete.
acceptance_criteria: Toggling a checkbox or similar action should change the task's status.

requirements.title: Mark Task as Incomplete
requirements.description: The user shall be able to mark a complete task as incomplete.
acceptance_criteria: Toggling the same checkbox or similar action should revert the task's status.

requirements.title: Edit Task Details
requirements.description: The user shall be able to edit the name, description, and due date of an existing task.
acceptance_criteria: An interface should allow modification of these fields.

requirements.title: Delete Task
requirements.description: The user shall be able to delete an existing task.
acceptance_criteria: A confirmation prompt should appear before permanent deletion.

requirements.title: Account-Based Data Persistence
requirements.description: The app shall store tasks securely on a server, associated with the logged-in user's account.
acceptance_criteria: Tasks created or modified by a user shall be accessible from any browser or device after logging into their account.

requirements.title: User Registration
requirements.description: The user shall be able to create a new account by providing a unique username (or email) and a password.
acceptance_criteria: The system should validate the uniqueness of the username/email.
The system should enforce basic password strength requirements (e.g., minimum length).

requirements.title: User Login
requirements.description: The user shall be able to log in to their account using their registered username/email and password.
acceptance_criteria: Successful login should grant access to their personal tasks.

requirements.title: User Logout
requirements.description: The user shall be able to log out of their account.
acceptance_criteria: Logging out should end the session and require re-authentication to access tasks.
